title: Biomethane: Europe’s Fast Track to Industrial Resilience [Promoted Content]
summary_full: A new Joint Biomethane Declaration delivers a clear message from industry: Industry needs biomethane. Its scale-up must happen now. Policymakers must remove barriers and align frameworks to unlock biomethane’s potential for competitiveness, energy security and rapid emissions reductions across Europe’s hardest-to-abate sectors.
